_comment: Hero Card System (Variant B) bluestar->power table, fitted so Deckbuilding's per-day power matches the in-game Classic/Control run. Deckbuilding earns more bluestars than Control, so its power-per-bluestar is lower. Tiers are geometric segments between anchor points (median Deckbuilding bluestars on day d under the NonPayer-Bluestar-9SP-11d scenario -> Control power on day d): a segment [B0,B1] uses multiplier (P1/P0)**(1/(B1-B0)) so power(B0)=P0 and power(B1)=P1. Power(B)=product of multiplier^(bluestars in tier). If the economy calibration (hero unlock, dupe pct, daily routine) changes, re-fit these anchors against the Control day-by-day power curve.
